values.name: Conceptual Foundation
values.use_when: a prior framework or distinction makes the later argument thinkable.

values.name: Audience Preparation
values.use_when: earlier work prepares readers to receive a later move.

values.name: Authority Establishment
values.use_when: prior work authorizes the later intervention or grants legitimacy.

values.name: Framework Provision
values.use_when: an upstream work provides the organizing frame or scaffold.

values.name: Problem Definition
values.use_when: the earlier work defines the problem that the later work inherits.

values.name: Methodological Precedent
values.use_when: the inheritance is chiefly a procedure or analytic method.

values.name: Intellectual Toolkit
values.use_when: the later work relies on concepts or distinctions as usable tools.

values.name: Cross-Domain Transfer
values.use_when: an earlier domain furnishes resources redeployed in a different domain.
